creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 205419
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.27.4 builds.

Cliqz has been updated from version 1.27.3 to 1.27.4.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building cliqz-1.27.4.

Notes about the patch

* Removes the unused gconf2 dependency
